<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\VarDumper; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster\Caster; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Cloner\Data; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Cloner\Stub; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Cloner\VarCloner; /** * A PsySH-specialized VarCloner. */ class Cloner extends VarCloner { private int $filter = 0; /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function cloneVar($var, $filter = 0): Data { $this->filter = $filter; return parent::cloneVar($var, $filter); } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ protected function castResource(Stub $stub, $isNested): array { return Caster::EXCLUDE_VERBOSE & $this->filter ? [] : parent::castResource($stub, $isNested); } }
